---
title: "About"
---

I am an AI researcher interested in robust, efficient, and interpretable machine learning systems.

My current interests include (but not limited to!):

- Brain decoding
- Robust algorithms for inverse problems
- ML for physics
- Evaluation and reliability
- Ressource efficient training/inference

## Contact

**I am currently looking for a PhD thesis, starting October/November 2026. If you have a project in mind in fundamental AI (AI methodology and mathematical analysis), medical AI or robotics, please let me know!**

- Email: firstname.lastname@enpc.fr
- GitHub: <https://github.com/XxelTitoxX>
- LinkedIn: <https://www.linkedin.com/in/edgar-duc-a2b853277/>
